message:
feat(messaging): implement FABRIC compiler, explain-plan, IR cost model, and ShardedSublist

Replace placeholder stubs in compiler.rs and explain.rs with full
deterministic implementations, extend the IR with cost estimation
types, and add a sharded subject index for scalable routing.

compiler.rs:
- FabricCompiler validates IR and emits per-subject CompiledSubjectCost
  records with delivery-class-based cost envelopes
- FabricCompileReport aggregates worst-case CostVector across all
  declared subjects
- FabricCompilerError wraps validation errors with stable count field

explain.rs:
- ExplainPlan with CostBreakdown rows in deterministic declaration order
- from_compile_report() generates operator-facing cost breakdown with
  family and delivery_class reasons per entry

ir.rs:
- LatencyEstimate (median/p99/p999), CpuCostEstimate (per_message/fanout)
- CostVector combining latency + CPU + memory + bandwidth estimates
- SubjectFamily::as_str() for canonical snake-case names in explain plans
- CostVector::estimate_subject() derives cost from delivery class,
  payload limits, and reply contract

subject.rs:
- ShardedSublist wrapping multiple Sublist instances with deterministic
  prefix-depth routing via DetHasher
- Concrete literal prefixes route to a single shard; broad wildcards
  fall back to a dedicated shard
- ShardedSubscriptionGuard for automatic unsubscription across shards
- SublistResult::extend() for merging cross-shard lookup results
- Minor cleanup: merge duplicate match arms in matches_subject_tokens

mod.rs:
- Re-export compiler and explain modules under messaging-fabric feature
- Add ShardedSublist and ShardedSubscriptionGuard to public API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
